hazards.description: Incorrect zone routing — command dispatched to wrong vehicle zone
Lost command — zone controller does not receive a critical command
Replayed command — stale command executed out of sequence
Payload corruption — bitflip in command payload causes erroneous actuation
Zone controller lockup — watchdog not triggered, controller unresponsive
Unauthorised command — unauthenticated source sends actuation commands
Power state race — commands sent during SLEEP transition cause undefined behaviour
Overflow in payload length field enables remote code execution
Denial of service via command flooding — critical commands delayed
Registry closed while commands in flight — undefined response to caller

operational_situations.description: ECU firmware update in service mode

safety_goals.description: Commands shall only be delivered to the correct target zone
Critical commands shall not be silently dropped
Replayed frames shall be detected and rejected
Payload integrity shall be verified before execution
Unresponsive controllers shall be detected within the watchdog window
Only authorised senders may issue actuation commands
Power state transitions shall be atomic with respect to concurrent commands
Payload length fields shall be validated before memory allocation
Critical-priority commands shall not be delayed by lower-priority flooding
Registry close shall signal all in-flight callers with a defined error
